prompt: Transform the years' sections into a gradually evolving spectrum to represent transitions over time.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Transform the distinct solid colors of the large arc segments on the left side of the diagram, labeled '2015', '2016', and '2017', into a continuous, gradually evolving color spectrum. The colors should smoothly blend from the 2015 segment, through the 2016 segment, and into the 2017 segment, creating a visual gradient that represents the flow and transition over time.
objects: Chart title "Remittance Inflow (US$ million) by Country and Year"
